title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXIX. Games.
content:
Clap hands, clap hands!
            Till father comes home;
        For father's got money,
            But mother's got none.
                    Clap hands, & c.
                        Till father, & c.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXIX. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
